name: super-bootstrap
description: Bootstrap or sync the superpowers development pipeline in any repo. /super-bootstrap is a thin orchestrator: it installs/syncs the generic harness runway (CLAUDE.md, skeleton docs, path-scoped rules, core plugin pins, default-on harness hooks incl. a pre-commit doc-sync gate), seeds product GAP cards on greenfield, and gates stack-matched skill/MCP/hook curation on substantive seed docs. Bundles commit, todo, log, help, merge, drain, and optional release-init — all namespaced under super-bootstrap: except the entry. Per-skill contracts live in each SKILL.md frontmatter (canonical catalog); plugin README carries the index. Solo dev workflow.
